case_title: MADDEN, MEKEISHA VS THE SAN FRANCISCO NEWSPAPER AGENCY (C/O RISK MGMT.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO NEWSPAPER AGENCY (C/O RISK MGMT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MADDEN, MEKEISHA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO NEWSPAPER AGENCY (C/O RISK MGMT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,197.58 FILED BY MADDEN, MEKEISHA AS TO DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO NEWSPAPER AGENCY (C/O RISK MGMT. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
